Claude Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

MakerAnthropic
CategoryAI Chatbots & Assistants, AI Writing Tools, AI Coding Assistants
PricingFree plan available; Pro $20/mo; Max plans from $100/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Claude →

Best for

Long-document analysis, coding, and nuanced writing tasks.

Pros

  • Excellent for long documents thanks to large context window
  • Strong, reliable coding assistant (Claude Code)
  • Careful, well-structured writing style

Cons

  • Free tier has tighter message limits than some rivals
  • No native image generation

Alternatives to Claude

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

Perplexity

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

Jasper

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.
